title: Allow Mirrored Columns in boards to be used in automations (Email addresses specifically)
excerpt: It would be amazing to have the ability to use mirrored email columns in a board in automations. This way we can have one board with contact details for a client or employee and mirror it to other boards.  This way the a…

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be amazing to have the ability to use mirrored email columns in a board in automations. This way we can have one board with contact details for a client or employee and mirror it to other boards. This way the automation can live on other boards as needed and use that mirrored column. I have sooooo many use cases for this. Please VOTE! haha

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! This is a big limitation at this point.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: @Arek @kjur there’s a solution for that if you’re not opposed to using an app, you can use Same Item Multiple Boards to share the same item in another board, and the email column will act as a normal column, so you can use it integrations and automations.
